subcodes.first_line: The world hath been seized by the smoke of tyranny, and the fire of malevolent souls hath been kindled. God willing, the Hand of Power shall extinguish it [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: عالم را دخان ظلم اخذ نموده و نار انفس خبیثه مشتعل انشاء الله ید قدرت خواموش
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @justice ['adl]; social justice and divine justice, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
